requirement_topic.en: EMC — Bare Induction Motor and ICASA Scope in South Africa
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——南非纯感应电机及ICASA适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——南非純感應電機及ICASA適用範圍

summary.en: South Africa does not have a single unified EMC directive equivalent to the EU's EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. EMC-related requirements for apparatus in South Africa are administered by ICASA (Independent Communications Authority of South Africa) under the Electronic Communications Act for apparatus that generates radio-frequency emissions. A bare mains-fed induction motor without integrated electronics is generally not classified as radio apparatus and typically falls outside ICASA's type-approval scope. However, industrial motors with integrated variable-frequency drives (VFDs) or electronic controllers may require ICASA type approval depending on their emission profile. SANS 60034 and NRCS compulsory specifications govern the motor product itself.
summary.zh: 南非没有相当于欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU的统一EMC指令。南非设备的EMC相关要求由ICASA（南非独立通信管理局）根据《电子通信法》针对产生射频辐射的设备进行管理。不含集成电子装置的纯感应电机通常不被列为无线电设备，一般不在ICASA型式认可范围内。但集成变频器（VFD）或电子控制器的工业电机，视其辐射特性可能需要ICASA型式认可。SANS 60034及NRCS强制规范管辖电机产品本身。
summary.zht: 南非沒有相當於歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU的統一EMC指令。南非設備的EMC相關要求由ICASA（南非獨立通信管理局）根據《電子通信法》針對產生射頻輻射的設備進行管理。不含集成電子裝置的純感應電機通常不被列為無線電設備，一般不在ICASA型式認可範圍內。但集成變頻器（VFD）或電子控制器的工業電機，視其輻射特性可能需要ICASA型式認可。SANS 60034及NRCS強制規範管轄電機產品本身。

standards_or_laws: Electronic Communications Act (South Africa) — ICASA radio apparatus type approval
SANS 60034 (SABS adoption of IEC 60034 — motor product standard)

summary.en: China does not impose a dedicated mandatory EMC standard on bare induction motors. For variable-speed drive systems, GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equivalent to IEC 61800-3:2004) provides EMC requirements for adjustable-speed power drive systems as a recommended (GB/T) standard. CCC certification may cover some electronics-integrated motor configurations if listed in the CCC catalogue, but bare industrial motors are generally exempt. ICASA type approval is a South Africa-specific requirement with no Chinese equivalent; Chinese CCC-EMC documentation does not substitute for ICASA type approval.
summary.zh: 中国对纯感应电机没有专门的强制性EMC标准。对于变速驱动系统，GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004）以推荐性国家标准（GB/T）形式提供变速电力传动系统的EMC要求。如列入CCC目录，CCC认证可覆盖部分集成电子装置的电机配置，但纯工业电机通常豁免。ICASA型式认可是南非特有要求，中国无对应制度；中国CCC-EMC文件不能替代ICASA型式认可。
summary.zht: 中國對純感應電機沒有專門的強制性EMC標準。對於變速驅動系統，GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004）以推薦性國家標準（GB/T）形式提供變速電力傳動系統的EMC要求。如列入CCC目錄，CCC認證可覆蓋部分集成電子裝置的電機配置，但純工業電機通常豁免。ICASA型式認可是南非特有要求，中國無對應制度；中國CCC-EMC文件不能替代ICASA型式認可。

standards_or_laws: CCC (for listed electronic motor configurations — not recognised by ICASA)

gap.en: For bare induction motors: ICASA type approval typically does not apply, reducing the EMC gap relative to EU. For motors with integrated VFDs or electronic control: ICASA type approval may be required and must be obtained before importation. Chinese CCC-EMC documentation and GB/T 12668.3 test reports do not substitute for ICASA approval. The gap is narrower than the EU EMC Directive gap for bare motors, but motor-drive integrated systems face an ICASA approval requirement that has no Chinese domestic equivalent.
gap.zh: 纯感应电机：ICASA型式认可通常不适用，相对欧盟EMC差距较小。集成变频器或电子控制的电机：可能需要ICASA型式认可，须在进口前取得。中国CCC-EMC文件和GB/T 12668.3测试报告不能替代ICASA认可。对于纯电机，差距比欧盟EMC指令要求更小；但电机-驱动集成系统面临ICASA认可要求，中国国内无对应制度。
gap.zht: 純感應電機：ICASA型式認可通常不適用，相對歐盟EMC差距較小。集成變頻器或電子控制的電機：可能需要ICASA型式認可，須在進口前取得。中國CCC-EMC文件和GB/T 12668.3測試報告不能替代ICASA認可。對於純電機，差距比歐盟EMC指令要求更小；但電機-驅動集成系統面臨ICASA認可要求，中國國內無對應制度。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for motor+VFD/electronics if generating radio-frequency emissions — ICASA type approval required; generally exempt for bare passive induction motors
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) only for bare motors; CCC may apply for some integrated electronics configurations — not equivalent to ICASA

source.publisher: Independent Communications Authority of South Africa (ICASA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bare induction motors exported from China to South Africa typically do not require ICASA type approval. Motors integrated with VFDs or electronic controllers that generate radio-frequency emissions should be checked for ICASA type approval requirements before importation. Chinese CCC-EMC documentation does not substitute for ICASA approval. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从中国出口至南非的纯感应电机通常无需ICASA型式认可。集成变频器或产生射频辐射的电子控制器的电机，应在进口前核查ICASA型式认可要求。中国CCC-EMC文件不能替代ICASA认可。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從中國出口至南非的純感應電機通常無需ICASA型式認可。集成變頻器或產生射頻輻射的電子控制器的電機，應在進口前核查ICASA型式認可要求。中國CCC-EMC文件不能替代ICASA認可。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Motor with Integrated VFD / Drive System (ICASA Type Approval)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——集成变频器的电机/驱动系统（ICASA型式认可）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——集成變頻器的電機/驅動系統（ICASA型式認可）

summary.en: When an industrial motor is combined with a variable-frequency drive (VFD), inverter, or other electronic control that generates radio-frequency emissions, the combined system may require ICASA type approval under South Africa's Electronic Communications Act before it can be legally imported or sold. ICASA type approval involves testing to applicable SANS/IEC EMC standards at a recognised laboratory. The NRCS LoA requirement for the motor itself is separate from and in addition to any ICASA approval for the integrated electronics. Both requirements must be satisfied independently.
summary.zh: 工业电机与产生射频辐射的变频器（VFD）、逆变器或其他电子控制装置组合使用时，该组合系统在合法进口或销售前，可能需要依据南非《电子通信法》取得ICASA型式认可。ICASA型式认可涉及在经认可实验室按适用SANS/IEC EMC标准进行测试。电机本身的NRCS LoA要求与集成电子装置的ICASA认可要求相互独立，须分别满足。
summary.zht: 工業電機與產生射頻輻射的變頻器（VFD）、逆變器或其他電子控制裝置組合使用時，該組合系統在合法進口或銷售前，可能需要依據南非《電子通信法》取得ICASA型式認可。ICASA型式認可涉及在經認可實驗室按適用SANS/IEC EMC標準進行測試。電機本身的NRCS LoA要求與集成電子裝置的ICASA認可要求相互獨立，須分別滿足。

standards_or_laws: Electronic Communications Act No. 36 of 2005 (South Africa) — ICASA radio apparatus type approval
SANS/IEC 61800-3 (EMC requirements for adjustable speed power drive systems)
NRCS compulsory specifications (separate LoA for the motor)

summary.en: For variable-speed drive systems, China uses the recommended standard GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equivalent to IEC 61800-3:2004, two editions behind the current IEC 61800-3:2022). No mandatory Chinese EMC regulatory step applies to most industrial motor-drive products for export; CCC may apply to some listed configurations domestically. ICASA type approval is a South African market-specific requirement; Chinese CCC-EMC test reports and certificates do not fulfil ICASA requirements and are not transferable.
summary.zh: 对于变速驱动系统，中国采用推荐性标准GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004，比现行IEC 61800-3:2022落后两个版本）。出口用大多数工业电机驱动产品无中国强制性EMC监管步骤；CCC可能在国内适用于部分列明配置。ICASA型式认可是南非特有市场要求；中国CCC-EMC测试报告和证书不能满足ICASA要求，不可转换。
summary.zht: 對於變速驅動系統，中國採用推薦性標準GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004，比現行IEC 61800-3:2022落後兩個版本）。出口用大多數工業電機驅動產品無中國強制性EMC監管步驟；CCC可能在國內適用於部分列明配置。ICASA型式認可是南非特有市場要求；中國CCC-EMC測試報告和證書不能滿足ICASA要求，不可轉換。

standards_or_laws: CCC (domestic market, not recognised by ICASA)

gap.en: Motor+VFD integrated systems exported from China to South Africa may require both NRCS LoA (for the motor) and ICASA type approval (for the integrated electronics/drive). Chinese GB/T 12668.3 and CCC-EMC documentation do not substitute for ICASA type approval. The exporter must identify whether the combined product falls under ICASA's radio apparatus type approval scope and, if so, obtain ICASA approval from a recognised laboratory before shipment.
gap.zh: 从中国出口至南非的电机+变频器集成系统，可能同时需要NRCS LoA（针对电机）和ICASA型式认可（针对集成电子装置/驱动器）。中国GB/T 12668.3及CCC-EMC文件不能替代ICASA型式认可。出口商须判断组合产品是否属于ICASA无线电设备型式认可范围，如适用，须在发货前从经认可实验室取得ICASA认可。
gap.zht: 從中國出口至南非的電機+變頻器集成系統，可能同時需要NRCS LoA（針對電機）和ICASA型式認可（針對集成電子裝置/驅動器）。中國GB/T 12668.3及CCC-EMC文件不能替代ICASA型式認可。出口商須判斷組合產品是否屬於ICASA無線電設備型式認可範圍，如適用，須在發貨前從經認可實驗室取得ICASA認可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for motor+VFD/electronics generating radio-frequency emissions — ICASA type approval required before import/sale; NRCS LoA is a separate additional requirement for the motor itself
mandatory_status.cn: No mandatory export EMC step for most industrial drive configurations — GB/T 12668.3 is recommended only; CCC domestic-only and not recognised by ICASA

source.publisher: Independent Communications Authority of South Africa (ICASA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor+VFD system exporters to South Africa must check ICASA type approval requirements in addition to NRCS LoA. Chinese CCC-EMC and GB/T 12668.3 compliance does not satisfy ICASA requirements. Two separate regulatory clearances (NRCS LoA for the motor and ICASA type approval for the drive electronics, if applicable) may be required before shipment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向南非出口中国电机+变频器系统的出口商，除NRCS LoA外还须核查ICASA型式认可要求。中国CCC-EMC及GB/T 12668.3合规不能满足ICASA要求。发货前可能需要两项独立监管许可（电机须取得NRCS LoA，如适用，驱动电子装置还须取得ICASA型式认可）。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向南非出口中國電機+變頻器系統的出口商，除NRCS LoA外還須核查ICASA型式認可要求。中國CCC-EMC及GB/T 12668.3合規不能滿足ICASA要求。發貨前可能需要兩項獨立監管許可（電機須取得NRCS LoA，如適用，驅動電子裝置還須取得ICASA型式認可）。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
